noProvider.title: One key, and Louis awakens.
noProvider.description: Louis runs on your own API keys — they stay encrypted on your instance. Connect one to start your first conversation.

emptyState.title: A new conversation.
emptyState.helpBody: Ask a question, attach a file (paperclip), or let Louis search the law (Légifrance, Pappers) and your documents. It can also draft documents as .docx. Every tool call is inspectable.
emptyState.subtitle: Ask a legal question, attach a file, or start from an example.
emptyState.suggestion1: Draft a formal notice for unpaid rent.
emptyState.suggestion2: Find recent case law on non-compete clauses.
emptyState.suggestion3: Summarise the key points of a court decision.
emptyState.suggestion4: Explain the regime of civil liability (art. 1240 French Civil Code).
emptyState.footerAttach: attach a file or a Louis document
emptyState.footerSovereignty: FR / EU / US badge = model sovereignty

composer.backToBottomAria: Back to bottom of the conversation
composer.dropOverlayLabel: Drop to attach to the conversation
composer.dropOverlayHint: PDF, DOCX or text — 25 MB max per file
composer.disclaimer: Louis is not a lawyer. Check the sovereignty badge before sending sensitive data.
composer.estimateUnpriced: · no pricing available for this model
composer.editHint: Enter to send · Esc to cancel
composer.attachToPromptHint: The extracted text will be inserted into the system prompt.

usage.title: Conversation usage
usage.pricingNote: Public provider rates — actual billing may vary.

docCards.editsApplied: {count, plural, one {# edit applied} other {# edits applied}}
docCards.moreEdits: + {count, plural, one {# more edit} other {# more edits}} in the document.
docCards.wordRevisionFooter: Native Word revision marks — open the file in Word / Pages / LibreOffice and use the Review tab to Accept or Reject each change.

messageActions.moreModels: {count, plural, one {# more model — switch model in the composer} other {# more models — switch model in the composer}}

conversationItem.deleteDescription: “{title}” will be permanently deleted. The messages cannot be recovered.

agentSteps.doneInSteps: {count, plural, one {Done in # step} other {Done in # steps}}

theatre.emptyDeliberation: The council has not started deliberating yet.

saturated.title: The model is saturated
saturated.description: The provider (Mistral, OpenAI…) is temporarily refusing requests — its service capacity is exceeded. This is common at peak times on free/standard tiers.
saturated.hint: Try again in 20-30 seconds, or switch model/provider (an agent on Claude/GPT instead of Mistral, for example).

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.description: You have reached your provider's limit. Wait a few seconds before trying again.
rateLimit.hint: If it persists, check your provider plan or add an alternative key.

invalidKey.title: Invalid provider key
invalidKey.description: The provider is rejecting your access key. Check that it is still valid and active.

modelNotFound.title: Model not found
modelNotFound.description: The selected model is not available with this provider. Choose another model in the picker.

overload.title: The provider is overloaded
overload.description: Anthropic or OpenAI is reporting a global overload. Try again in a minute.

noOutput.title: The model produced nothing
noOutput.description: The stream ended without generating a response. Often due to a provider timeout or a prompt that saturates the context. Try again, or shorten your question.

incoherentHistory.title: Inconsistent conversation history
incoherentHistory.description: The provider expects each tool result to be preceded by its call — a previous turn was probably interrupted during a tool call. Retrying restarts the request with a clean history. If the error persists, start a new conversation.

providerRefused.title: The provider refused the request
providerRefused.description: The model or its aggregator (OpenRouter, OVH, Scaleway…) returned a generic error. Switching model in the composer picker often unblocks it.

network.title: Network problem
network.description: The connection to the provider failed — check your Internet access or the provider's status. Try again in a few seconds.

generic.title: An error occurred
generic.description: Unknown error while communicating with the provider.

approval.timeout: Without a response within 5 min, the action is denied.

docPanel.viewMarkdownTitle: View the Markdown (what the AI reads)
docPanel.backToPdfTitle: Back to the faithful PDF preview
docPanel.footerEditing: WYSIWYG editing — “Save” creates a new .docx version.
docPanel.footerMarkdown: Canonical Markdown — the exact text read by the AI (RAG, prompt, reviews).
docPanel.footerPdf: Faithful PDF preview. Switch to “Markdown” to see what the AI reads.
docPanel.footerLibreOffice: Paginated preview via LibreOffice — identical to the downloaded Word document.
docPanel.footerDocx: DOCX rendering via docx-preview — faithful to opening in Word/Pages.
